title: Irish Boxty Potato Cakes
description: A traditional Irish dish made with shredded potatoes and pan-fried until crispy. Serve with your favorite toppings.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine shredded Irish potato, grated boxty, and grated potato.
Add melted butter, salt, and black pepper to the bowl. Mix well.
Using your hands, shape the mixture into 4-6 patties.
Heat a non-stick pan with a small amount of oil over medium heat.
Add the patties to the pan and cook for 4-5 minutes on each side.
Serve hot with your favorite toppings.
Note: Boxty can be found in most Irish or international grocery stores.
